_comment_2: Captured against R-2.1 ship build output. Pre-R-2.1 R-4.0 baseline preserved as _previous_baseline below for delta tracking.
_comment_4: Update this fixture with a justification in the commit message when intentional bundle growth lands. Spec 11 fails if any non-runtime-editor chunk grows by more than 5%.
_comment_5: Runtime-editor chunks (RuntimeEditorShell, TenantUserPicker, RuntimeHostTestPage, TenantRouteTree) are excluded — they're EXPECTED to change as R-2+ phases land.
_comment_6: R-2.1 growth: 10 entity-card-section sub-component files (DeliveryCard 4 + AncillaryCard 3 + OrderCard 3) + entity-card-sections registrations shim + InspectorPanel outer-tabs strip + Selection union + selectSection action increases the main bundle by ~22.5 KB (5,544,572 → 5,567,053 bytes, +0.41%). Well under the +0.5% target. RuntimeEditorShell chunk grew 25.13 KB → 30.66 KB (+22%) excluded per policy.

main_bundle.description: Tenant + admin app entry — combined ChunkA bundle that all routes depend on. R-2.1 +0.41% over R-3.1 (entity-card sub-section decomposition + InspectorPanel outer tabs + Selection union).

css.description: Compiled Tailwind v4 + DESIGN_LANGUAGE.md token surface. R-2.1 +0.39% (additional Tailwind classes from sub-section components). Well under tolerance.

chart_renderer.description: Lazy-loaded recharts wrapper for SavedView chart variants. Unchanged by R-2.1.
